name: Sanction
description: The trust and governance layer for autonomous AI agents. Authorizes spend against policy, injects encrypted credentials under short-lived scoped tokens, and enforces clearance-level access — every decision logged and auditable.

skills.name: Authorize spend
skills.description: Decide whether an agent may make a purchase/subscription/transfer under wallet policy. Returns approved, denied, or escalated with a typed code and remediation hint. Call before any financial action.
examples: May I spend $12 on an API subscription in the 'software' category?
Authorize a $250 transfer to vendor X.

skills.name: Inject credential
skills.description: Exchange a short-lived scoped execution token for a decrypted credential the agent is cleared to use. Every injection is audit-logged; raw values never appear in logs.
examples: Inject the 'openai' API key for this execution.

skills.name: Track LLM token usage
skills.description: Record token counts and cost of an LLM call against the wallet's daily budget for spend tracking and audit.
examples: Log 1,200 input and 800 output tokens for claude-opus-4-8 costing $0.04.
